description: An automated job runs daily to find and deactivate any coupon codes that have passed their expiration date.

nodes.task_description: Query the system for all active coupon codes whose expiration date is in the past.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a list of expired codes.

nodes.task_description: For each expired code, change its status to 'Inactive'.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully deactivates all the identified coupon codes.
